descriptions.stripe: Process online payments, subscriptions, and manage billing with Stripe's secure payment gateway.
descriptions.twilioWhatsapp: Send automated messages and notifications to students via WhatsApp.
descriptions.googleCalendar: Connect your Google Calendar to automatically detect and import available time slots.
descriptions.googleMeet: Create and manage Google Meet video conferences for online classes and meetings.
descriptions.googleSheet: Sync your Flowclass data with Google Sheets for reporting and analysis.
descriptions.googleDrive: Sync documents and class materials with Google Drive for streamlined file management.

rootFolder.title: Root Folder Selection
rootFolder.description: Choose the root folder where all education materials will be organized.
rootFolder.warning: Once a root folder is selected, it cannot be changed. Changing the folder may result in loss of materials and links, or inaccessibility. Please choose carefully as this action is irreversible.
rootFolder.button: Choose Root Folder From Google Drive
rootFolder.noIntegrationFolders: No folder connections found. Please connect your Google Drive first.

rootFolder.quotaError: Your Google Drive quota is not enough to create the root folder. Please try again with a smaller file size or select a different folder.

suggestedFolders.description: This structure will be created within your selected root folder
